generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
  output   = "../prisma/generated/client"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
}

model Event {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())
  event     String
  sessionId String
  blocked   Boolean  @default(false)
  data      String   // full HookInput as JSON text
  summary   String?
  keywords  String?  // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([timestamp])
}

model Session {
  sessionId       String   @id
  startedAt       DateTime
  updatedAt       DateTime
  cwd             String
  repoRoot        String?
  repoName        String?
  parentSessionId String?
  gitUserName     String?
  gitUserEmail    String?
  prompt          String?
  summary         String?
  keywords        String?  // JSON array as text
}

model AgentParent {
  agentId         String @id
  parentSessionId String
}

model PendingToolUse {
  toolUseId String  @id
  toolName  String
  toolInput String? // JSON text
  startedAt String  // pre-formatted display string from fmt()
}

model InteractionOverview {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId String   @unique
  summary   String
  keywords  String   // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'
  startedAt DateTime
  endedAt   DateTime
}

// ─── Entire CLI checkpoint tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────

model CheckpointMetadata {
  id               Int                          @id @default(autoincrement())
  cliVersion       String?
  checkpointId     String                       @unique
  strategy         String?
  branch           String?
  checkpointsCount Int                          @default(0)
  tokenUsageId     Int?                         @unique
  tokenUsage       TokenUsage?                  @relation("CheckpointMetadataTokenUsage", fields: [tokenUsageId], references: [id])
  sessions         SessionLink[]
  filesTouched     CheckpointMetadataFilePath[]
}

model SessionLink {
  id                   Int                 @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointMetadataId Int?
  checkpointMetadata   CheckpointMetadata? @relation(fields: [checkpointMetadataId], references: [id])
  metadata             String?
  transcript           String?
  context              String?
  contentHash          String?
  prompt               String?
  logEvents            LogEvent[]

  @@index([checkpointMetadataId])
}

model CheckpointMetadataFilePath {
  checkpointMetadataId Int
  filePathId           Int
  checkpointMetadata   CheckpointMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointMetadataId], references: [id])
  filePath             FilePath           @relation("CheckpointMetadataFilePaths", fields: [filePathId], references: [id])

  @@id([checkpointMetadataId, filePathId])
}

model FilePath {
  id                     Int                                @id @default(autoincrement())
  path                   String                             @unique
  checkpointFiles        CheckpointMetadataFilePath[]        @relation("CheckpointMetadataFilePaths")
  checkpointSessionFiles CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath[] @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePaths")
}

model TokenUsage {
  id                        Int                        @id @default(autoincrement())
  inputTokens               Int                        @default(0)
  cacheCreationTokens       Int                        @default(0)
  cacheReadTokens           Int                        @default(0)
  outputTokens              Int                        @default(0)
  apiCallCount              Int                        @default(0)
  checkpointMetadata        CheckpointMetadata?        @relation("CheckpointMetadataTokenUsage")
  checkpointSessionMetadata CheckpointSessionMetadata? @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataTokenUsage")
}

model CheckpointSessionMetadata {
  id                  Int                                   @id @default(autoincrement())
  cliVersion          String?
  checkpointId        String
  sessionId           String
  strategy            String?
  createdAt           DateTime?
  branch              String?
  checkpointsCount    Int                                   @default(0)
  agent               String?
  turnId              String?
  tokenUsageId        Int?                                  @unique
  tokenUsage          TokenUsage?                           @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataTokenUsage", fields: [tokenUsageId], references: [id])
  filesTouched        CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath[]
  initialAttribution  InitialAttribution?
  summary             CheckpointSessionSummary?

  @@unique([checkpointId, sessionId])
  @@index([sessionId])
}

model CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath {
  checkpointSessionMetadataId Int
  filePathId                  Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata   CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  filePath                    FilePath                  @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePaths", fields: [filePathId], references: [id])

  @@id([checkpointSessionMetadataId, filePathId])
}

model InitialAttribution {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int                       @unique
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  calculatedAt                  DateTime?
  agentLines                    Int                       @default(0)
  humanAdded                    Int                       @default(0)
  humanModified                 Int                       @default(0)
  humanRemoved                  Int                       @default(0)
  totalCommitted                Int                       @default(0)
  agentPercentage               Float                     @default(0)
}

model CheckpointSessionSummary {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int                       @unique
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  intent                        String
  outcome                       String
  openItems           OpenItem[]
  frictionItems       FrictionItem[]
  repoLearnings       RepoLearning[]
  codeLearnings       CodeLearning[]
  workflowLearnings   WorkflowItem[]
}

model OpenItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionSummaryId    Int
  checkpointSessionSummary      CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionSummaryId], references: [id])
  text                          String
  status                        String                    @default("open") // "open" | "in_progress" | "complete" | "na"
  subSessionId                  String?

  @@unique([checkpointSessionSummaryId, text])
  @@index([checkpointSessionSummaryId])
}

model FrictionItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionSummaryId    Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionSummaryId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionSummaryId])
}

model RepoLearning {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}

model CodeLearning {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  path                          String
  finding                       String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}

model WorkflowItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}


model CheckpointIdGitOidJoin {
  gitOid       String @id
  checkpointId String

  @@index([checkpointId])
}

// ─── Full JSONL log tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// One row per line in full.jsonl, with normalized sub-tables for content blocks,
// token usage, progress events, and system events.

model LogEvent {
  id              Int             @id @default(autoincrement())
  uuid            String?         @unique  // present on most event types
  messageId       String?         @unique  // used by file-history-snapshot instead of uuid
  sessionId       String?
  parentUuid      String?
  type            String          // user | assistant | progress | system | file-history-snapshot
  timestamp       DateTime?
  cwd             String?
  gitBranch       String?
  version         String?
  slug            String?
  isSidechain     Boolean?
  userType        String?
  toolUseId       String?
  parentToolUseId String?
  requestId       String?         // present on assistant events
  data            String          // full raw JSON of the event line
  sessionLinkId   Int?
  sessionLink     SessionLink?    @relation(fields: [sessionLinkId], references: [id])
  contents        LogContent[]
  usage           LogUsage?
  hookProgress    LogHookProgress?
  systemData      LogSystemEvent?

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([type])
  @@index([sessionLinkId])
}

// One row per content block within a user or assistant message.
model LogContent {
  id                Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId        Int
  logEvent          LogEvent  @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  role              String    // user | assistant
  contentIndex      Int       // 0-based position in the content array
  contentType       String    // text | thinking | tool_use | tool_result
  text              String?   // type=text
  thinking          String?   // type=thinking
  toolUseId         String?   // type=tool_use (id field) or type=tool_result (tool_use_id field)
  toolName          String?   // type=tool_use
  toolInput         String?   // type=tool_use, JSON text of input object
  toolResultContent String?   // type=tool_result, stringified content
  isError           Boolean?  // type=tool_result

  @@index([logEventId])
  @@index([toolUseId])
}

// Token usage summary for assistant messages.
model LogUsage {
  id                       Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId               Int      @unique
  logEvent                 LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  model                    String?
  stopReason               String?
  inputTokens              Int      @default(0)
  cacheCreationInputTokens Int      @default(0)
  cacheReadInputTokens     Int      @default(0)
  outputTokens             Int      @default(0)
}

// The `data` sub-object present on progress events (type=hook_progress).
model LogHookProgress {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId Int      @unique
  logEvent   LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  type       String?  // e.g. hook_progress
  hookEvent  String?  // e.g. PreToolUse, PostToolUse
  hookName   String?  // e.g. PreToolUse:Read
  command    String?  // shell command that was run
}

// Extra fields for system events.
model LogSystemEvent {
  id                    Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId            Int      @unique
  logEvent              LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  subtype               String?  // e.g. stop_hook_summary, turn_duration
  hookCount             Int?
  stopReason            String?
  preventedContinuation Boolean?
  level                 String?
  durationMs            Int?     // present on turn_duration subtype
}

// ------------------------------------------- OLD

model Checkpoint {
  id           Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId String             @unique
  cliVersion   String?
  branch       String?
  strategy     String?
  filesTouched String?            // JSON array: '["file.ts","other.ts"]'
  tokenUsage   String?            // JSON object: '{"input_tokens":0,...}'
  indexedAt    DateTime           @default(now())
  sessions     CheckpointSession[]
}

model CheckpointSession {
  id                 Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId       String
  sessionIndex       Int                // 0-based position within the checkpoint
  sessionId          String             @unique
  turnId             String?
  agent              String?
  createdAt          DateTime?
  filesTouched       String?            // JSON array
  tokenUsage         String?            // JSON object
  initialAttribution        String?           // JSON object: agent_lines, human_added, agent_percentage, ...
  checkpointTranscriptStart Int?              // line index where this checkpoint's events begin in the transcript
  transcriptLinesAtStart    Int?              // total transcript lines at checkpoint start
  checkpoint                Checkpoint        @relation(fields: [checkpointId], references: [checkpointId])
  messages                  CheckpointMessage[]
  summary                   CheckpointSummary?

  @@index([checkpointId])
}

// Tracks every checkpoint a session appears in (many-to-many).
// CheckpointSession.sessionId stays @unique (canonical latest-state record);
// this table captures the full history.
model CheckpointSessionLink {
  id           Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId String
  sessionId    String

  @@unique([checkpointId, sessionId])
  @@index([sessionId])
}

model CheckpointSummary {
  id                Int               @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId         String            @unique
  intent            String
  outcome           String
  learningsRepo     String?           // JSON array of strings
  learningsCode     String?           // JSON array of {path, finding} objects
  learningsWorkflow String?           // JSON array of strings
  friction          String?           // JSON array of strings
  openItems         String?           // JSON array of strings
  session           CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])
}

model CheckpointMessage {
  id              Int               @id @default(autoincrement())
  uuid            String            @unique  // event uuid from full.jsonl
  sessionId       String
  parentUuid      String?
  type            String            // "user", "assistant", "progress", "file-history-snapshot", ...
  timestamp       DateTime?
  cwd             String?
  gitBranch       String?
  slug            String?
  version         String?
  planContent     String?           // present on user messages that include a plan
  toolUseId       String?
  parentToolUseId String?
  data            String            // raw JSON of the full event line
  session         CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([type])
}

content.text: There's a bug — the same session appears in multiple shadow branches (as the session spans multiple code commits, the transcript grows). The current `fullJsonlBlobSha` check breaks because each branch has a different SHA. Fix: track all previously-seen SHAs per session as a JSON array.

input.old_string:
model ShadowSession {
  id               Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId        String     @unique
  branch           String              // shadow branch name, e.g. "entire/d74fb9d-e3b0c4"
  fullJsonlBlobSha String?             // git blob SHA of full.jsonl; used to detect updates
  prompt           String?
  cwd              String?
  gitBranch        String?             // the working branch inside the session
  createdAt        DateTime?
  logEvents        LogEvent[]
}
input.new_string:
model ShadowSession {
  id            Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId     String     @unique
  branch        String              // most recently active shadow branch
  seenBlobShas  String     @default("[]")  // JSON array of git blob SHAs already indexed
  prompt        String?
  cwd           String?
  gitBranch     String?             // the working branch inside the session
  createdAt     DateTime?
  logEvents     LogEvent[]
}

model ShadowSession {

toolUseResult.originalFile:
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
  output   = "../prisma/generated/client"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
}

model Event {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())
  event     String
  sessionId String
  blocked   Boolean  @default(false)
  data      String   // full HookInput as JSON text
  summary   String?
  keywords  String?  // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([timestamp])
}

model Session {
  sessionId       String   @id
  startedAt       DateTime
  updatedAt       DateTime
  cwd             String
  repoRoot        String?
  repoName        String?
  parentSessionId String?
  gitUserName     String?
  gitUserEmail    String?
  prompt          String?
  summary         String?
  keywords        String?  // JSON array as text
}

model AgentParent {
  agentId         String @id
  parentSessionId String
}

model PendingToolUse {
  toolUseId String  @id
  toolName  String
  toolInput String? // JSON text
  startedAt String  // pre-formatted display string from fmt()
}

model InteractionOverview {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId String   @unique
  summary   String
  keywords  String   // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'
  startedAt DateTime
  endedAt   DateTime
}

// ─── Entire CLI checkpoint tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────

model CheckpointMetadata {
  id               Int                          @id @default(autoincrement())
  cliVersion       String?
  checkpointId     String                       @unique
  strategy         String?
  branch           String?
  checkpointsCount Int                          @default(0)
  tokenUsageId     Int?                         @unique
  tokenUsage       TokenUsage?                  @relation("CheckpointMetadataTokenUsage", fields: [tokenUsageId], references: [id])
  sessions         SessionLink[]
  filesTouched     CheckpointMetadataFilePath[]
}

model SessionLink {
  id                   Int                 @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointMetadataId Int?
  checkpointMetadata   CheckpointMetadata? @relation(fields: [checkpointMetadataId], references: [id])
  metadata             String?
  transcript           String?
  context              String?
  contentHash          String?
  prompt               String?
  logEvents            LogEvent[]

  @@index([checkpointMetadataId])
}

model CheckpointMetadataFilePath {
  checkpointMetadataId Int
  filePathId           Int
  checkpointMetadata   CheckpointMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointMetadataId], references: [id])
  filePath             FilePath           @relation("CheckpointMetadataFilePaths", fields: [filePathId], references: [id])

  @@id([checkpointMetadataId, filePathId])
}

model FilePath {
  id                     Int                                @id @default(autoincrement())
  path                   String                             @unique
  checkpointFiles        CheckpointMetadataFilePath[]        @relation("CheckpointMetadataFilePaths")
  checkpointSessionFiles CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath[] @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePaths")
}

model TokenUsage {
  id                        Int                        @id @default(autoincrement())
  inputTokens               Int                        @default(0)
  cacheCreationTokens       Int                        @default(0)
  cacheReadTokens           Int                        @default(0)
  outputTokens              Int                        @default(0)
  apiCallCount              Int                        @default(0)
  checkpointMetadata        CheckpointMetadata?        @relation("CheckpointMetadataTokenUsage")
  checkpointSessionMetadata CheckpointSessionMetadata? @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataTokenUsage")
}

model CheckpointSessionMetadata {
  id                  Int                                   @id @default(autoincrement())
  cliVersion          String?
  checkpointId        String
  sessionId           String
  strategy            String?
  createdAt           DateTime?
  branch              String?
  checkpointsCount    Int                                   @default(0)
  agent               String?
  turnId              String?
  tokenUsageId        Int?                                  @unique
  tokenUsage          TokenUsage?                           @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataTokenUsage", fields: [tokenUsageId], references: [id])
  filesTouched        CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath[]
  initialAttribution  InitialAttribution?
  summary             CheckpointSessionSummary?

  @@unique([checkpointId, sessionId])
  @@index([sessionId])
}

model CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath {
  checkpointSessionMetadataId Int
  filePathId                  Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata   CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  filePath                    FilePath                  @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePaths", fields: [filePathId], references: [id])

  @@id([checkpointSessionMetadataId, filePathId])
}

model InitialAttribution {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int                       @unique
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  calculatedAt                  DateTime?
  agentLines                    Int                       @default(0)
  humanAdded                    Int                       @default(0)
  humanModified                 Int                       @default(0)
  humanRemoved                  Int                       @default(0)
  totalCommitted                Int                       @default(0)
  agentPercentage               Float                     @default(0)
}

model CheckpointSessionSummary {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int                       @unique
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  intent                        String
  outcome                       String
  openItems           OpenItem[]
  frictionItems       FrictionItem[]
  repoLearnings       RepoLearning[]
  codeLearnings       CodeLearning[]
  workflowLearnings   WorkflowItem[]
}

model OpenItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionSummaryId    Int
  checkpointSessionSummary      CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionSummaryId], references: [id])
  text                          String
  status                        String                    @default("open") // "open" | "in_progress" | "complete" | "na"
  subSessionId                  String?

  @@unique([checkpointSessionSummaryId, text])
  @@index([checkpointSessionSummaryId])
}

model FrictionItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionSummaryId    Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionSummaryId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionSummaryId])
}

model RepoLearning {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}

model CodeLearning {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  path                          String
  finding                       String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}

model WorkflowItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}


model CheckpointIdGitOidJoin {
  gitOid       String @id
  checkpointId String

  @@index([checkpointId])
}

// ─── Full JSONL log tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// One row per line in full.jsonl, with normalized sub-tables for content blocks,
// token usage, progress events, and system events.

// Tracks an in-progress session from a shadow branch (entire/<commit>-<hash>).
// Shadow sessions are indexed directly from git without a worktree.
// Once a session is committed to entire/checkpoints/v1 it also appears as a
// CheckpointSessionMetadata; the LogEvent uuid-dedup prevents double-indexing.
model ShadowSession {
  id               Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId        String     @unique
  branch           String              // shadow branch name, e.g. "entire/d74fb9d-e3b0c4"
  fullJsonlBlobSha String?             // git blob SHA of full.jsonl; used to detect updates
  prompt           String?
  cwd              String?
  gitBranch        String?             // the working branch inside the session
  createdAt        DateTime?
  logEvents        LogEvent[]
}

model LogEvent {
  id              Int             @id @default(autoincrement())
  uuid            String?         @unique  // present on most event types
  messageId       String?         @unique  // used by file-history-snapshot instead of uuid
  sessionId       String?
  parentUuid      String?
  type            String          // user | assistant | progress | system | file-history-snapshot
  timestamp       DateTime?
  cwd             String?
  gitBranch       String?
  version         String?
  slug            String?
  isSidechain     Boolean?
  userType        String?
  toolUseId       String?
  parentToolUseId String?
  requestId       String?         // present on assistant events
  data            String          // full raw JSON of the event line
  sessionLinkId   Int?
  sessionLink     SessionLink?    @relation(fields: [sessionLinkId], references: [id])
  shadowSessionId Int?
  shadowSession   ShadowSession?  @relation(fields: [shadowSessionId], references: [id])
  contents        LogContent[]
  usage           LogUsage?
  hookProgress    LogHookProgress?
  systemData      LogSystemEvent?

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([type])
  @@index([sessionLinkId])
  @@index([shadowSessionId])
}

// One row per content block within a user or assistant message.
model LogContent {
  id                Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId        Int
  logEvent          LogEvent  @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  role              String    // user | assistant
  contentIndex      Int       // 0-based position in the content array
  contentType       String    // text | thinking | tool_use | tool_result
  text              String?   // type=text
  thinking          String?   // type=thinking
  toolUseId         String?   // type=tool_use (id field) or type=tool_result (tool_use_id field)
  toolName          String?   // type=tool_use
  toolInput         String?   // type=tool_use, JSON text of input object
  toolResultContent String?   // type=tool_result, stringified content
  isError           Boolean?  // type=tool_result

  @@index([logEventId])
  @@index([toolUseId])
}

// Token usage summary for assistant messages.
model LogUsage {
  id                       Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId               Int      @unique
  logEvent                 LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  model                    String?
  stopReason               String?
  inputTokens              Int      @default(0)
  cacheCreationInputTokens Int      @default(0)
  cacheReadInputTokens     Int      @default(0)
  outputTokens             Int      @default(0)
}

// The `data` sub-object present on progress events (type=hook_progress).
model LogHookProgress {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId Int      @unique
  logEvent   LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  type       String?  // e.g. hook_progress
  hookEvent  String?  // e.g. PreToolUse, PostToolUse
  hookName   String?  // e.g. PreToolUse:Read
  command    String?  // shell command that was run
}

// Extra fields for system events.
model LogSystemEvent {
  id                    Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId            Int      @unique
  logEvent              LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  subtype               String?  // e.g. stop_hook_summary, turn_duration
  hookCount             Int?
  stopReason            String?
  preventedContinuation Boolean?
  level                 String?
  durationMs            Int?     // present on turn_duration subtype
}

// ------------------------------------------- OLD

model Checkpoint {
  id           Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId String             @unique
  cliVersion   String?
  branch       String?
  strategy     String?
  filesTouched String?            // JSON array: '["file.ts","other.ts"]'
  tokenUsage   String?            // JSON object: '{"input_tokens":0,...}'
  indexedAt    DateTime           @default(now())
  sessions     CheckpointSession[]
}

model CheckpointSession {
  id                 Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId       String
  sessionIndex       Int                // 0-based position within the checkpoint
  sessionId          String             @unique
  turnId             String?
  agent              String?
  createdAt          DateTime?
  filesTouched       String?            // JSON array
  tokenUsage         String?            // JSON object
  initialAttribution        String?           // JSON object: agent_lines, human_added, agent_percentage, ...
  checkpointTranscriptStart Int?              // line index where this checkpoint's events begin in the transcript
  transcriptLinesAtStart    Int?              // total transcript lines at checkpoint start
  checkpoint                Checkpoint        @relation(fields: [checkpointId], references: [checkpointId])
  messages                  CheckpointMessage[]
  summary                   CheckpointSummary?

  @@index([checkpointId])
}

// Tracks every checkpoint a session appears in (many-to-many).
// CheckpointSession.sessionId stays @unique (canonical latest-state record);
// this table captures the full history.
model CheckpointSessionLink {
  id           Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId String
  sessionId    String

  @@unique([checkpointId, sessionId])
  @@index([sessionId])
}

model CheckpointSummary {
  id                Int               @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId         String            @unique
  intent            String
  outcome           String
  learningsRepo     String?           // JSON array of strings
  learningsCode     String?           // JSON array of {path, finding} objects
  learningsWorkflow String?           // JSON array of strings
  friction          String?           // JSON array of strings
  openItems         String?           // JSON array of strings
  session           CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])
}

model CheckpointMessage {
  id              Int               @id @default(autoincrement())
  uuid            String            @unique  // event uuid from full.jsonl
  sessionId       String
  parentUuid      String?
  type            String            // "user", "assistant", "progress", "file-history-snapshot", ...
  timestamp       DateTime?
  cwd             String?
  gitBranch       String?
  slug            String?
  version         String?
  planContent     String?           // present on user messages that include a plan
  toolUseId       String?
  parentToolUseId String?
  data            String            // raw JSON of the full event line
  session         CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([type])

content.text:
Perfectly idle after the initial pass. Here's a summary of what was built:

**Schema (`prisma/schema.prisma`)**
- New `ShadowSession` table: `sessionId` (unique), `branch` (most recent active branch), `seenBlobShas` (JSON array of all blob SHAs indexed — prevents re-indexing across branches), `prompt`, `cwd`, `gitBranch`, `createdAt`
- `LogEvent` gains optional `shadowSessionId` FK

**Indexer (`src/indexer.ts`)**
- `indexFullJsonl` refactored into `indexFullJsonl` (file path) + `indexFullJsonlContent` (string content), both accepting optional `shadowSessionId`
- `indexAllShadowBranches(db, repoPath)`: finds shadow branches via `git branch`, lists sessions via `git ls-tree`, reads content via `git cat-file blob` (no worktree), deduplicates by blob SHA set

**Server (`src/server.ts`)**
- Second poller every 5s calling `indexAllShadowBranches` — fast enough to pick up live session updates

**Results:** 4 distinct sessions indexed across 6 shadow branches — 01576012 (895 events), 87999cec (567 events across 3 branches), c15bd67e (418 events across 2 branches), fe35d57b (304 events). Plus 51 committed checkpoints from `entire/checkpoints/v1`.

   200→}
   201→
   202→model CodeLearning {
   203→  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
   204→  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
   205→  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
   206→  path                          String

   211→
   212→model WorkflowItem {
   213→  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
   214→  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
   215→  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
   216→  text                          String
   217→
   218→  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
   219→}
   220→
   221→
   222→model CheckpointIdGitOidJoin {
   223→  gitOid       String @id
   224→  checkpointId String
   225→
   226→  @@index([checkpointId])
   227→}
   228→
   229→// ─── Full JSONL log tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   230→// One row per line in full.jsonl, with normalized sub-tables for content blocks,
   231→// token usage, progress events, and system events.
   232→
   233→// Tracks an in-progress session from a shadow branch (entire/<commit>-<hash>).
   234→// Shadow sessions are indexed directly from git without a worktree.
   235→// Once a session is committed to entire/checkpoints/v1 it also appears as a
   236→// CheckpointSessionMetadata; the LogEvent uuid-dedup prevents double-indexing.
   237→model ShadowSession {
   238→  id            Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
   239→  sessionId     String     @unique
   240→  branch        String              // most recently active shadow branch
   241→  seenBlobShas  String     @default("[]")  // JSON array of git blob SHAs already indexed
   242→  prompt        String?
   243→  cwd           String?
   244→  gitBranch     String?             // the working branch inside the session
   245→  createdAt     DateTime?
   246→  logEvents     LogEvent[]
   247→}
   248→
   249→model LogEvent {
   250→  id              Int             @id @default(autoincrement())
   251→  uuid            String?         @unique  // present on most event types
   252→  messageId       String?         @unique  // used by file-history-snapshot instead of uuid
   253→  sessionId       String?
   254→  parentUuid      String?
   255→  type            String          // user | assistant | progress | system | file-history-snapshot
   256→  timestamp       DateTime?
   257→  cwd             String?
   258→  gitBranch       String?
   259→  version         String?
   260→  slug            String?
   261→  isSidechain     Boolean?
   262→  userType        String?
   263→  toolUseId       String?
   264→  parentToolUseId String?
   265→  requestId       String?         // present on assistant events
   266→  data            String          // full raw JSON of the event line
   267→  sessionLinkId   Int?
   268→  sessionLink     SessionLink?    @relation(fields: [sessionLinkId], references: [id])
   269→  shadowSessionId Int?
   270→  shadowSession   ShadowSession?  @relation(fields: [shadowSessionId], references: [id])
   271→  contents        LogContent[]
   272→  usage           LogUsage?
   273→  hookProgress    LogHookProgress?
   274→  systemData      LogSystemEvent?
   275→
   276→  @@index([sessionId])
   277→  @@index([type])
   278→  @@index([sessionLinkId])
   279→  @@index([shadowSessionId])
   280→}
   281→
   282→// One row per content block within a user or assistant message.
   283→model LogContent {
   284→  id                Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
   285→  logEventId        Int
   286→  logEvent          LogEvent  @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
   287→  role              String    // user | assistant
   288→  contentIndex      Int       // 0-based position in the content array
   289→  contentType       String    // text | thinking | tool_use | tool_result
   290→  text              String?   // type=text
   291→  thinking          String?   // type=thinking
   292→  toolUseId         String?   // type=tool_use (id field) or type=tool_result (tool_use_id field)
   293→  toolName          String?   // type=tool_use
   294→  toolInput         String?   // type=tool_use, JSON text of input object
   295→  toolResultContent String?   // type=tool_result, stringified content
   296→  isError           Boolean?  // type=tool_result
   297→
   298→  @@index([logEventId])
   299→  @@index([toolUseId])
   300→}
   301→
   302→// Token usage summary for assistant messages.
   303→model LogUsage {
   304→  id                       Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
   305→  logEventId               Int      @unique
   306→  logEvent                 LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
   307→  model                    String?
   308→  stopReason               String?
   309→  inputTokens              Int      @default(0)
   310→  cacheCreationInputTokens Int      @default(0)
   311→  cacheReadInputTokens     Int      @default(0)
   312→  outputTokens             Int      @default(0)
   313→}
   314→
   315→// The `data` sub-object present on progress events (type=hook_progress).
   316→model LogHookProgress {
   317→  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
   318→  logEventId Int      @unique
   319→  logEvent   LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
   320→  type       String?  // e.g. hook_progress

   322→  hookName   String?  // e.g. PreToolUse:Read

   324→}
   325→
   326→// Extra fields for system events.
   327→model LogSystemEvent {
   328→  id                    Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
   329→  logEventId            Int      @unique
   330→  logEvent              LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
   331→  subtype               String?  // e.g. stop_hook_summary, turn_duration
   332→  hookCount             Int?
   333→  stopReason            String?
   334→  preventedContinuation Boolean?
   335→  level                 String?
   336→  durationMs            Int?     // present on turn_duration subtype
   337→}
   338→
   339→// ------------------------------------------- OLD
   340→
   341→model Checkpoint {
   342→  id           Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
   343→  checkpointId String             @unique
   344→  cliVersion   String?
   345→  branch       String?
   346→  strategy     String?
   347→  filesTouched String?            // JSON array: '["file.ts","other.ts"]'
   348→  tokenUsage   String?            // JSON object: '{"input_tokens":0,...}'
   349→  indexedAt    DateTime           @default(now())

   352→
   353→model CheckpointSession {
   354→  id                 Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
   355→  checkpointId       String
   356→  sessionIndex       Int                // 0-based position within the checkpoint
   357→  sessionId          String             @unique
   358→  turnId             String?
   359→  agent              String?
   360→  createdAt          DateTime?
   361→  filesTouched       String?            // JSON array
   362→  tokenUsage         String?            // JSON object

   364→  checkpointTranscriptStart Int?              // line index where this checkpoint's events begin in the transcript
   365→  transcriptLinesAtStart    Int?              // total transcript lines at checkpoint start
   366→  checkpoint                Checkpoint        @relation(fields: [checkpointId], references: [checkpointId])
   367→  messages                  CheckpointMessage[]

   369→
   370→  @@index([checkpointId])
   371→}
   372→
   373→// Tracks every checkpoint a session appears in (many-to-many).
   374→// CheckpointSession.sessionId stays @unique (canonical latest-state record);
   375→// this table captures the full history.
   376→model CheckpointSessionLink {
   377→  id           Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
   378→  checkpointId String
   379→  sessionId    String
   380→
   381→  @@unique([checkpointId, sessionId])
   382→  @@index([sessionId])

   387→  sessionId         String            @unique

   392→  learningsWorkflow String?           // JSON array of strings
   393→  friction          String?           // JSON array of strings
   394→  openItems         String?           // JSON array of strings
   395→  session           CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])
   396→}
   397→
   398→model CheckpointMessage {

   404→  timestamp       DateTime?

   412→  data            String            // raw JSON of the full event line
   413→  session         CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])
   414→
   415→  @@index([sessionId])
   416→  @@index([type])
   417→}

   222→model CheckpointIdGitOidJoin {
   223→  gitOid       String @id
   224→  checkpointId String
   225→
   226→  @@index([checkpointId])
   227→}
   228→
   229→// ─── Full JSONL log tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   230→// One row per line in full.jsonl, with normalized sub-tables for content blocks,
   231→// token usage, progress events, and system events.
   232→
   233→// Tracks an in-progress session from a shadow branch (entire/<commit>-<hash>).
   234→// Shadow sessions are indexed directly from git without a worktree.
   235→// Once a session is committed to entire/checkpoints/v1 it also appears as a
   236→// CheckpointSessionMetadata; the LogEvent uuid-dedup prevents double-indexing.
   237→model ShadowSession {
   238→  id            Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
   239→  sessionId     String     @unique
   240→  branch        String              // most recently active shadow branch
   241→  seenBlobShas  String     @default("[]")  // JSON array of git blob SHAs already indexed
   242→  prompt        String?
   243→  cwd           String?
   244→  gitBranch     String?             // the working branch inside the session
   245→  createdAt     DateTime?
   246→  logEvents     LogEvent[]
   247→}
   248→
   249→model LogEvent {
   250→  id              Int             @id @default(autoincrement())
   251→  uuid            String?         @unique  // present on most event types
   252→  messageId       String?         @unique  // used by file-history-snapshot instead of uuid
   253→  sessionId       String?
   254→  parentUuid      String?
   255→  type            String          // user | assistant | progress | system | file-history-snapshot
   256→  timestamp       DateTime?
   257→  cwd             String?
   258→  gitBranch       String?
   259→  version         String?
   260→  slug            String?
   261→  isSidechain     Boolean?
   262→  userType        String?
   263→  toolUseId       String?
   264→  parentToolUseId String?
   265→  requestId       String?         // present on assistant events
   266→  data            String          // full raw JSON of the event line
   267→  sessionLinkId   Int?
   268→  sessionLink     SessionLink?    @relation(fields: [sessionLinkId], references: [id])
   269→  shadowSessionId Int?
   270→  shadowSession   ShadowSession?  @relation(fields: [shadowSessionId], references: [id])
   271→  contents        LogContent[]
   272→  usage           LogUsage?
   273→  hookProgress    LogHookProgress?
   274→  systemData      LogSystemEvent?
   275→
   276→  @@index([sessionId])
   277→  @@index([type])
   278→  @@index([sessionLinkId])
   279→  @@index([shadowSessionId])
   280→}
   281→
   282→// One row per content block within a user or assistant message.
   283→model LogContent {
   284→  id                Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
   285→  logEventId        Int
   286→  logEvent          LogEvent  @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
   287→  role              String    // user | assistant
   288→  contentIndex      Int       // 0-based position in the content array
   289→  contentType       String    // text | thinking | tool_use | tool_result
   290→  text              String?   // type=text
   291→  thinking          String?   // type=thinking
   292→  toolUseId         String?   // type=tool_use (id field) or type=tool_result (tool_use_id field)
   293→  toolName          String?   // type=tool_use
   294→  toolInput         String?   // type=tool_use, JSON text of input object
   295→  toolResultContent String?   // type=tool_result, stringified content
   296→  isError           Boolean?  // type=tool_result
   297→
   298→  @@index([logEventId])
   299→  @@index([toolUseId])
   300→}
   301→
   302→// Token usage summary for assistant messages.
   303→model LogUsage {
   304→  id                       Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
   305→  logEventId               Int      @unique
   306→  logEvent                 LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
   307→  model                    String?
   308→  stopReason               String?
   309→  inputTokens              Int      @default(0)
   310→  cacheCreationInputTokens Int      @default(0)
   311→  cacheReadInputTokens     Int      @default(0)
   312→  outputTokens             Int      @default(0)
   313→}
   314→
   315→// The `data` sub-object present on progress events (type=hook_progress).
   316→model LogHookProgress {
   317→  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
   318→  logEventId Int      @unique
   319→  logEvent   LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
   320→  type       String?  // e.g. hook_progress
   321→  hookEvent  String?  // e.g. PreToolUse, PostToolUse
   322→  hookName   String?  // e.g. PreToolUse:Read
   323→  command    String?  // shell command that was run
   324→}
   325→
   326→// Extra fields for system events.
   327→model LogSystemEvent {
   328→  id                    Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
   329→  logEventId            Int      @unique
   330→  logEvent              LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
   331→  subtype               String?  // e.g. stop_hook_summary, turn_duration
   332→  hookCount             Int?
   333→  stopReason            String?
   334→  preventedContinuation Boolean?
   335→  level                 String?
   336→  durationMs            Int?     // present on turn_duration subtype
   337→}
   338→
   339→// ------------------------------------------- OLD
   340→
   341→model Checkpoint {
   342→  id           Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
   343→  checkpointId String             @unique
   344→  cliVersion   String?
   345→  branch       String?
   346→  strategy     String?
   347→  filesTouched String?            // JSON array: '["file.ts","other.ts"]'
   348→  tokenUsage   String?            // JSON object: '{"input_tokens":0,...}'
   349→  indexedAt    DateTime           @default(now())
   350→  sessions     CheckpointSession[]
   351→}
   352→
   353→model CheckpointSession {
   354→  id                 Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
   355→  checkpointId       String
   356→  sessionIndex       Int                // 0-based position within the checkpoint
   357→  sessionId          String             @unique
   358→  turnId             String?
   359→  agent              String?
   360→  createdAt          DateTime?
   361→  filesTouched       String?            // JSON array
   362→  tokenUsage         String?            // JSON object
   363→  initialAttribution        String?           // JSON object: agent_lines, human_added, agent_percentage, ...
   364→  checkpointTranscriptStart Int?              // line index where this checkpoint's events begin in the transcript
   365→  transcriptLinesAtStart    Int?              // total transcript lines at checkpoint start

Perfect! Now I have all the information needed. Let me create a comprehensive report.

## Comprehensive Exploration Report: Gossamer Project

I've successfully explored the gossamer codebase and gathered all requested information. Here's a detailed report:

---

### 1. UI SCREENS AND COMPONENTS

#### Web/Electron Renderer (`app/src/renderer/src/`)

This is a **React + React Router + Mantine** web application (NOT Expo mobile app). The project has a unified desktop/web UI built with modern technologies.

**File Structure:**
- `/app/src/renderer/src/main.tsx` — React app entry point with MantineProvider theme
- `/app/src/renderer/src/App.tsx` — React Router with nested routes
- `/app/src/renderer/src/Layout.tsx` — Main AppShell with sidebar navigation
- `/app/src/renderer/src/screens/` — Page components
- `/app/src/renderer/src/components/` — Reusable UI components
- `/app/src/renderer/src/api.ts` — API client library
- `/app/src/renderer/src/primitives.tsx` — Legacy (no longer imported)

**Key Screens:**
1. **ActiveSessions** (`/app/src/renderer/src/screens/ActiveSessions.tsx`)
   - Lists all sessions in a Mantine Table with sticky header
   - 7 columns: Session ID, User, Branch, Intent, Parent, Started, Updated
   - Uses SessionRow component for each row
   - Live WebSocket updates via subscribeToUpdates()
   - Shows loading/error states with Loader and Alert components

2. **SessionDetail** (`/app/src/renderer/src/screens/SessionDetail.tsx`, partial read)
   - Displays full session transcript with events and tool use
   - Groups Claude turns with tool groups
   - Shows ClaudeTurnCard for assistant messages
   - Integrates session checkpoints
   - Allows spawning sub-sessions with open items

3. **Checkpoints** (`/app/src/renderer/src/screens/Checkpoints.tsx`, partial read)
   - Lists all indexed checkpoints in cards
   - Shows metadata: intent, checkpointId, branch, created timestamp
   - Displays token usage and file counts

4. **Additional Screens:**
   - SessionTree — hierarchical session view
   - CheckpointDetail — single checkpoint with sessions
   - CheckpointTimeline — timeline of checkpoints
   - Search — full-text search over log events

**Navigation:**
- Layout.tsx provides AppShell with:
  - Collapsible sidebar (nav items: Sessions, Session Tree, Checkpoints, Timeline)
  - Header with back button, breadcrumb, search input
  - Theme toggle (dark/light via Mantine)
  - Version badge (v0.1)

---

### 2. SESSIONROW COMPONENT

**File:** `/app/src/renderer/src/components/SessionRow.tsx`

- **Props:** `session: Session`, `onPress: () => void`
- **Column Widths (fixed):**
  - sessionId: 140px
  - user: 160px
  - branch: 120px
  - intent: 340px
  - parentSessionId: 120px
  - started: 110px
  - updated: 110px

- **Features:**
  - Activity indicator dot (green/yellow/gray) based on last update time
  - CopyCell component: each cell has tooltip + copy-to-clipboard button
  - Displays session ID (first 8 chars truncated)
  - Shows git user (email as mailto link if available)
  - Branch in monospace (teal color)
  - Intent truncated to 160 chars from prompt if intent/summary not set
  - Relative timestamps with absolute time on hover (copy-friendly)

---

### 3. API CLIENT (`app/src/renderer/src/api.ts`)

**Base URLs:**
```typescript
export const API_BASE = "http://localhost:3000/api";
export const WS_URL = "ws://localhost:3000";
```

**Session API:**
- `fetchSessions(): Promise<Session[]>` — GET /api/sessions (all sessions ordered by updatedAt desc)
- `fetchSession(id): Promise<Session>` — GET /api/sessions/:id
- `fetchSessionOverview(id): Promise<InteractionOverview | null>` — GET /api/sessions/:id/overview
- `fetchSessionEvents(id): Promise<Event[]>` — GET /api/sessions/:id/events
- `fetchSessionCheckpoints(id): Promise<SessionCheckpoint[]>` — GET /api/v2/sessions/:id/checkpoints
- `fetchLogEvents(id): Promise<LogEventItem[]>` — GET /api/v2/sessions/:id/log-events

**Checkpoint API:**
- `fetchCheckpoints(): Promise<Checkpoint[]>` — GET /api/v2/checkpoints
- `fetchCheckpoint(id): Promise<Checkpoint>` — GET /api/v2/checkpoints/:id
- `fetchCheckpointMessages(checkpointId): Promise<CheckpointMessage[]>` — GET /api/checkpoints/:id/messages

**Action API:**
- `spawnSession(prompt, cwd, openItemIds?, parentSessionId?)` — POST /api/sessions/spawn
- `updateOpenItemStatus(id, status, subSessionId?)` — PATCH /api/open-items/:id

**Search API:**
- `fetchSearch(query, limit=50): Promise<SearchResult[]>` — GET /api/search?q=TEXT&limit=N

**WebSocket:**
- `subscribeToUpdates(onUpdate): () => void` — connects to ws://localhost:3000 with exponential backoff
- Listens for `{ type: "sessions_updated" }` message

**Core Types:**
```typescript
interface Session {
  sessionId: string;
  startedAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
  cwd: string;
  repoRoot: string | null;
  repoName: string | null;
  parentSessionId: string | null;
  childSessionIds: string[];
  gitUserName: string | null;
  gitUserEmail: string | null;
  prompt: string | null;
  summary: string | null;
  keywords: string[];
  branch: string | null;
  intent: string | null;
}

interface LogEventItem {
  id: number;
  uuid: string | null;
  sessionId: string | null;
  type: string;  // user | assistant | progress | system | file-history-snapshot
  timestamp: string | null;
  contents: LogContentBlock[];
  usage: { model, stopReason, inputTokens, outputTokens, ... } | null;

#### Modern Tables (V2 — Checkpoint/Full Log Era)

**CheckpointSessionMetadata** (lines 116-135)

- Unique constraint: [checkpointId, sessionId]
- Index: sessionId

**CheckpointSessionSummary** (lines 159-170)
- Intent and outcome for a checkpoint-session
- Relations to: openItems, frictionItems, repoLearnings, codeLearnings, workflowLearnings

**ShadowSession** (lines 237-247)
- Tracks in-progress session from shadow branch (entire/<commit>-<hash>)
- Fields: sessionId (unique), branch, seenBlobShas (JSON array), prompt, cwd, gitBranch, createdAt
- Relation: logEvents (many)

**LogEvent** (lines 249-280)
- **One row per line in full.jsonl**
- Fields: uuid, messageId, sessionId, type (user|assistant|progress|system|file-history-snapshot)

- Relations: sessionLink (nullable), shadowSession (nullable), contents (many), usage (1:1), hookProgress (1:1), systemData (1:1)
- Indexes: sessionId, type, sessionLinkId, shadowSessionId

**LogContent** (lines 283-300)
- One row per content block in user/assistant messages
- ContentType: text | thinking | tool_use | tool_result
- Fields: text, thinking, toolUseId, toolName, toolInput (JSON), toolResultContent, isError
- Index: logEventId, toolUseId

**LogUsage** (lines 303-313)
- Token usage summary for assistant messages
- Fields: model, stopReason, inputTokens, cacheCreationInputTokens, cacheReadInputTokens, outputTokens

**LogHookProgress** (lines 316-324)
- Progress data from hook events
- Fields: type, hookEvent, hookName, command

**LogSystemEvent** (lines 327-337)
- System event metadata (turn duration, hook counts, stop reasons)
- Fields: subtype, hookCount, stopReason, preventedContinuation, level, durationMs

**TokenUsage** (lines 105-114)
- Shared token usage across checkpoint and session metadata
- Fields: inputTokens, cacheCreationTokens, cacheReadTokens, outputTokens, apiCallCount

**SessionLink** (lines 75-87)
- Junction between CheckpointMetadata and LogEvent
- Fields: metadata, transcript, context, contentHash, prompt
- Relations: checkpointMetadata (optional), logEvents (many)

**InitialAttribution** (lines 146-157)
- Code attribution for checkpoint-session
- Fields: calculatedAt, agentLines, humanAdded, humanModified, humanRemoved, totalCommitted, agentPercentage

**OpenItem** (lines 172-182)
- Open task within a checkpoint summary
- Fields: text, status ("open"|"in_progress"|"complete"|"na"), subSessionId
- Relations: checkpointSessionSummary
- Unique: [checkpointSessionSummaryId, text]

**FrictionItem, RepoLearning, CodeLearning, WorkflowItem** (lines 184-219)
- Child records of CheckpointSessionSummary
- Normalized learning/friction data from summarization

#### Legacy Tables (V1 — Original Hook Event Model)

**Event** (lines 10-22)
- Original hook event capture (deprecated)
- Fields: timestamp, event, sessionId, blocked, data (JSON string)
- Indexes: sessionId, timestamp

**Session** (lines 24-37)
- Original session record (mostly superseded by LogEvent)
- Stores cwd, repoRoot, repoName, parentSessionId, git user info

**Checkpoint, CheckpointSession, CheckpointMessage** (lines 341-417)
- Legacy checkpoint model (being replaced by CheckpointSessionMetadata + LogEvent)

### SUMMARY OF INTEGRATION POINTS

**UI → API Flow:**
1. React components (ActiveSessions, SessionDetail, etc.) call `app/src/renderer/src/api.ts` functions
2. API client makes HTTP/WS calls to localhost:3000
3. Express server in `src/server.ts` queries Prisma database
4. Prisma ORM reads/writes to SQLite at ~/.claude/hook-handler.db

**Data Flow:**
- New sessions start → Session table + first LogEvent
- Agent runs → LogEvents accumulate in full.jsonl
- Checkpoints created → CheckpointSessionMetadata + summary tables
- UI polls /api/sessions every 2s (WebSocket pushes updates)
- Search queries FTS5 table for log content

**Key Design:**
- Dual table structure: legacy (Event/Session) + modern (LogEvent/CheckpointSessionMetadata)
- Shadow branches indexed live before checkpoint
- Open items track work across sessions (spawning new child sessions)
- Token usage tracked separately in TokenUsage table, reused across multiple entities

## Comprehensive Exploration Report: Gossamer Project

### 1. UI SCREENS AND COMPONENTS

#### Web/Electron Renderer (`app/src/renderer/src/`)

This is a **React + React Router + Mantine** web application (NOT Expo mobile app). The project has a unified desktop/web UI built with modern technologies.

**File Structure:**
- `/app/src/renderer/src/main.tsx` — React app entry point with MantineProvider theme
- `/app/src/renderer/src/App.tsx` — React Router with nested routes
- `/app/src/renderer/src/Layout.tsx` — Main AppShell with sidebar navigation
- `/app/src/renderer/src/screens/` — Page components
- `/app/src/renderer/src/components/` — Reusable UI components
- `/app/src/renderer/src/api.ts` — API client library
- `/app/src/renderer/src/primitives.tsx` — Legacy (no longer imported)

**Key Screens:**
1. **ActiveSessions** (`/app/src/renderer/src/screens/ActiveSessions.tsx`)
   - Lists all sessions in a Mantine Table with sticky header
   - 7 columns: Session ID, User, Branch, Intent, Parent, Started, Updated
   - Uses SessionRow component for each row
   - Live WebSocket updates via subscribeToUpdates()
   - Shows loading/error states with Loader and Alert components

2. **SessionDetail** (`/app/src/renderer/src/screens/SessionDetail.tsx`, partial read)
   - Displays full session transcript with events and tool use
   - Groups Claude turns with tool groups
   - Shows ClaudeTurnCard for assistant messages
   - Integrates session checkpoints
   - Allows spawning sub-sessions with open items

3. **Checkpoints** (`/app/src/renderer/src/screens/Checkpoints.tsx`, partial read)
   - Lists all indexed checkpoints in cards
   - Shows metadata: intent, checkpointId, branch, created timestamp
   - Displays token usage and file counts

4. **Additional Screens:**
   - SessionTree — hierarchical session view
   - CheckpointDetail — single checkpoint with sessions
   - CheckpointTimeline — timeline of checkpoints
   - Search — full-text search over log events

**Navigation:**
- Layout.tsx provides AppShell with:
  - Collapsible sidebar (nav items: Sessions, Session Tree, Checkpoints, Timeline)
  - Header with back button, breadcrumb, search input
  - Theme toggle (dark/light via Mantine)
  - Version badge (v0.1)

### 2. SESSIONROW COMPONENT

**File:** `/app/src/renderer/src/components/SessionRow.tsx`

- **Props:** `session: Session`, `onPress: () => void`
- **Column Widths (fixed):**
  - sessionId: 140px
  - user: 160px
  - branch: 120px
  - intent: 340px
  - parentSessionId: 120px
  - started: 110px
  - updated: 110px

- **Features:**
  - Activity indicator dot (green/yellow/gray) based on last update time
  - CopyCell component: each cell has tooltip + copy-to-clipboard button
  - Displays session ID (first 8 chars truncated)
  - Shows git user (email as mailto link if available)
  - Branch in monospace (teal color)
  - Intent truncated to 160 chars from prompt if intent/summary not set
  - Relative timestamps with absolute time on hover (copy-friendly)

export const WS_URL = "ws://localhost:3000";
```

**Session API:**
- `fetchSessions(): Promise<Session[]>` — GET /api/sessions (all sessions ordered by updatedAt desc)
- `fetchSession(id): Promise<Session>` — GET /api/sessions/:id
- `fetchSessionOverview(id): Promise<InteractionOverview | null>` — GET /api/sessions/:id/overview
- `fetchSessionEvents(id): Promise<Event[]>` — GET /api/sessions/:id/events
- `fetchSessionCheckpoints(id): Promise<SessionCheckpoint[]>` — GET /api/v2/sessions/:id/checkpoints
- `fetchLogEvents(id): Promise<LogEventItem[]>` — GET /api/v2/sessions/:id/log-events

**Checkpoint API:**
- `fetchCheckpoints(): Promise<Checkpoint[]>` — GET /api/v2/checkpoints
- `fetchCheckpoint(id): Promise<Checkpoint>` — GET /api/v2/checkpoints/:id
- `fetchCheckpointMessages(checkpointId): Promise<CheckpointMessage[]>` — GET /api/checkpoints/:id/messages

**Action API:**
- `spawnSession(prompt, cwd, openItemIds?, parentSessionId?)` — POST /api/sessions/spawn
- `updateOpenItemStatus(id, status, subSessionId?)` — PATCH /api/open-items/:id

**Search API:**
- `fetchSearch(query, limit=50): Promise<SearchResult[]>` — GET /api/search?q=TEXT&limit=N

**WebSocket:**
- `subscribeToUpdates(onUpdate): () => void` — connects to ws://localhost:3000 with exponential backoff
- Listens for `{ type: "sessions_updated" }` message

  logEventType: string;
  snippet: string;
  rank: number;
}

content.text:
Everything is working. Here's a summary of what changed:

**`src/server.ts`**
- `SessionResponse` gains `isLive: boolean`
- `GET /api/sessions` now reconstructs sessions entirely from `CheckpointSessionMetadata` + `ShadowSession` — the legacy `Session` table is no longer consulted. For each sessionId, it joins the latest checkpoint's `intent` and `branch`, the shadow session's `prompt` and `cwd`, and derives `startedAt`/`updatedAt` from min/max `LogEvent` timestamps
- `GET /api/sessions/:id` does the same for a single session
- WS change detector now watches `logEvent` max id (catches shadow updates) and `shadowSession` max id (catches new shadow branches), instead of the legacy `event` table
- Deleted unused `mapSession` helper

**`app/src/renderer/src/api.ts`**
- `Session.isLive: boolean` added

**`app/src/renderer/src/components/SessionRow.tsx`**
- Session ID column widened to 180px to fit the badge
- Live sessions show a small orange `live` badge next to their ID

message.content: It looks like there is a UI regression: the session details page doesn't show the github profile pic or username anymore, just "you". It should find the git author and show it.

content.content: /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer/app/src/renderer/src/screens/SessionDetail.tsx

content.text:
The regression is clear: my new `GET /api/sessions/:id` always returns `gitUserName: null` and `gitUserEmail: null` because the checkpoint/shadow data doesn't carry that info. The session detail screen uses those to build `userInfo` for the avatar and name display. Previously this came from the hook-populated `Session` table.

The fix: read git user info from the repo's git config in the server, and include it in session responses.

+  // Try local config first (cwd), then fall back to global
+  const name  = (cwd ? gitConfigGet("user.name", cwd)  : null) ?? gitConfigGet("--global user.name");
+  const email = (cwd ? gitConfigGet("user.email", cwd) : null) ?? gitConfigGet("--global user.email");

content.text:
Git user is now correctly returned. The session detail page will use `gitUserName = "nosman"` to show the GitHub profile pic (`https://github.com/nosman.png`) and username.

The fix was two parts:
1. Added `getGitUser(cwd?)` helper to `server.ts` that reads `git config user.name/email`, trying local repo config first then falling back to global
2. Resolved the git user once at server startup (`const gitUser = getGitUser(repoDir)`) and injected it into both `GET /api/sessions` and `GET /api/sessions/:id` responses — the second endpoint had a different indentation level so the `replace_all` edit missed it

content.text: Let me read the actual indexer logic for `indexCheckpointV2` to understand exactly what happens when a checkpoint is committed for a session that's already shadow-indexed:

Now I see the full picture. The indexer correctly creates `CheckpointSessionMetadata` when a new checkpoint arrives. The problem is that `SessionDetail.tsx` only loads its data once (via `useEffect([id])`) and never subscribes to WebSocket updates — so when the checkpoint indexer runs and broadcasts, the session detail page doesn't re-fetch.

The fix: subscribe to WS updates in `SessionDetail` and re-fetch checkpoints and session on change.

content.text:
Clean build. The fix is purely in `SessionDetail.tsx`:

- Extracted the checkpoint-merging logic into `applyCheckpoints(logEvs, checkpoints)` so it can be called from both the initial load and the live-update handler
- Added a second `useEffect` that calls `subscribeToUpdates` and re-fetches log events + checkpoints whenever the server broadcasts a change — this is what fires when the checkpoint indexer commits a new checkpoint (or the shadow indexer adds new events)

The session data (git user, breadcrumbs) is only fetched on initial load since that info doesn't change mid-session.

content.text: The worktree HEAD is tracking the right branch but the working tree is stale — there are staged deletions for the new checkpoint files. The problem is `reset --hard FETCH_HEAD`: when `git fetch origin` fails (SSH not available), `FETCH_HEAD` is stale, so the reset does nothing useful. But the branch `entire/checkpoints/v1` IS already at the latest commit locally (entire commits locally), so we just need to reset to the branch tip directly.

content.text:
2 checkpoints now showing for that session. The root cause was `reset --hard FETCH_HEAD` — when `git fetch origin` fails (SSH keys not available for the remote), `FETCH_HEAD` stays stale, so the worktree working tree never advanced to the new commits even though the local branch ref was already updated by entire committing locally.

The fix: separate fetch (best-effort, swallowed) from reset, and reset to the **branch name** (`entire/checkpoints/v1`) rather than `FETCH_HEAD`. The branch ref is always current since entire commits directly to the local repo.

message.content: Great, so now new checkpoints will always show up?

content.text:
Yes, with the two fixes together:

1. **Worktree always advances** — `reset --hard ${CHECKPOINT_BRANCH}` uses the local branch ref, which entire updates immediately on commit. Previously `reset --hard FETCH_HEAD` silently did nothing when the remote fetch failed.

2. **UI always refreshes** — `SessionDetail` now subscribes to WS updates and re-fetches checkpoints when the server broadcasts. Previously the page was static after initial load.

The remaining latency is just the 30-second checkpoint poll interval. One caveat: if a new shadow branch appears (a brand-new session), the shadow indexer picks it up within 5 seconds. But if that session then gets committed to `entire/checkpoints/v1`, the checkpoint won't appear in the detail page until the next 30-second tick — at most 30 seconds after the commit.
